claims.statement: The test instructions set JAVA_HOME to the openjdk@21 Homebrew path.
The test instructions prepend JAVA_HOME/bin to PATH.
The tests are run with mvn test.

entities.name: User
entities.description: The human interacting with the system.

entities.name: JAVA_HOME
entities.description: Environment variable for the Java installation path.

entities.name: PATH
entities.description: Environment variable for executable search paths.

entities.name: Maven
entities.description: Build tool used to run tests.

entities.name: test
entities.description: Maven goal used to run tests.
